name: BLR Edge Router 1
role: Primary WAN edge router (eBGP to LON and SG)

name: BLR Edge Router 2
role: Secondary WAN edge router (eBGP to LON and SG)

name: BLR Floor 1 Access Layer
role: Aggregated access layer for floor 1 (~8 switches)

name: BLR Floor 2 Access Layer
role: Aggregated access layer for floor 2 (~8 switches)

name: BLR Floor 3 Access Layer
role: Aggregated access layer for floor 3 (~8 switches)

name: BLR Floor 4 Access Layer
role: Aggregated access layer for floor 4 (~8 switches)

name: BLR Floor 1 AP Group
role: Wireless APs for floor 1 (Corp WiFi + Guest)

name: BLR Floor 2 AP Group
role: Wireless APs for floor 2 (Corp WiFi + Guest)

name: BLR Floor 3 AP Group
role: Wireless APs for floor 3 (Corp WiFi + Guest)

name: LON Edge Router 1
role: Primary WAN edge router (eBGP to BLR and NYC)

name: LON Edge Router 2
role: Secondary WAN edge router (eBGP to BLR and NYC)

name: NYC Edge Router 1
role: Primary WAN edge router (eBGP to LON and SG)

name: NYC Edge Router 2
role: Secondary WAN edge router (eBGP to LON and SG)

name: SG Edge Router 1
role: Primary DC WAN edge router (eBGP to BLR and NYC)

name: SG Edge Router 2
role: Secondary DC WAN edge router (eBGP to BLR and NYC)

name: SG Leaf Switch 3
role: ToR for server rack 3 (DB cluster) — single-homed critical server
